title: narcissus jonquilla subsp. fernandesii
intro: Narcissus jonquilla subsp. fernandesii, also known as the Portuguese narcissus, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the Amaryllidaceae family. This plant is known for its sweetly fragrant, white flowers and is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Narcissus jonquilla subsp. fernandesii include its ability to aid in respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve overall well-being. The plant can be prepared as an infusion or tincture, and its essential oil can also be extracted for use in aromatherapy and other herbal preparations.
